title: Dragon Egg Hatch Hight (Ice and Fire Addon)
description: Makes Baby Dragon's genders are determined by the hight you placed them.
body:
### The Mod is Back :D
I fix the orginal issue of dragons, that were not player owned, changing genders when spawn naturally. 

When a egg hatches below Y64 it will be female and above 64 will be male.

-Added Insta Hatch Staff(Creative only)
